title: Reactive plot doesn't update when site filter changes
body: Selecting a new field site in the sidebar doesn't redraw the abundance plot until you also toggle the year. Probably a missing dependency in the reactive expression.

title: NA species counts break the stacked bar chart
body: When a survey row has NA in the count column ggplot drops the whole bar instead of treating it as zero. Need to decide drop vs zero-fill and document it.

title: Add tide-height overlay to the timeseries panel
body: Would be great to show predicted low-tide height behind the abundance timeseries so reviewers can see survey conditions at a glance.

title: Color palette is not colorblind-safe
body: Swap the default ggplot palette for viridis or Okabe-Ito so the species categories are distinguishable.

title: Bump shiny and ggplot2 to current CRAN
body: renv lockfile is pinned to old shiny; reactlog deprecation warnings on startup. Update and re-snapshot.

title: Download-CSV button exports unfiltered data
body: The download handler ignores the active site/year filters and dumps the full dataset. Should respect the current view.

title: Deploy to research cluster (cel-apps namespace)
body: Containerize the app and get it running on the university research cluster so the lab can reach it without my laptop being on.

title: Species name typos break the join to the lookup table
body: Mytilus trossulus is spelled three different ways across datasheets so the taxonomy join drops rows. Need a fuzzy-match or cleaning step.

title: Make the pipeline reproducible with targets
body: Right now I re-run scripts by hand in the wrong order half the time. Move to the targets package so the DAG is explicit.

title: Tide-height column has mixed units (m vs ft)
body: Some 2025 datasheets recorded tide height in feet. Normalize everything to meters in the cleaning step and add a unit check.

title: Document the raw-data folder structure
body: Add a README explaining where the monthly survey CSVs live and the expected column schema.

title: align_tide_window() off by one when survey crosses midnight
body: If a low-tide window straddles midnight the function grabs the wrong day's prediction. Need to widen the search window.

title: Add CRS check before sf::st_transform
body: Functions silently assume EPSG:4326 input. Add a check and a clear error if the CRS is missing.

title: PR: add roxygen docs and pkgdown site
body: Documents all exported functions and sets up a pkgdown site for the helpers.

title: Flag duplicate quadrat IDs within a survey date
body: Field assistants occasionally reuse a quadrat ID. The QA report should catch duplicates per site per date.

title: Counts above 999 are almost always data-entry errors
body: Add a soft warning in the validation report when a per-quadrat count exceeds 999 so I can eyeball it.

title: Render the QA report as parameterized RMarkdown
body: One HTML report per survey date with a site parameter, instead of one giant report.

title: ggplot2 section: aes() vs aes_string() confusion
body: A couple workshop attendees hit deprecation warnings from aes_string. Update the slides to use tidy evaluation.

title: Add a reproducible-reports exercise with renv
body: Requested by Rachel for journal club. Walk through renv::init and snapshot in the last section.
